{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Spirit-trap
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A spirit-trap uses a scripted mirror to imprison [[Remnants]] and [[sacred beasts]] using their own [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
